note: 노출용으로 손수 고른 5★ Google Play 리뷰. 후보는 `node scripts/fetch_reviews.js` → scripts/_reviews_pool.json 참고. 여기 items 를 고치면 홈 후기 섹션이 바뀝니다.

items.name: Fabio Rodriguez
items.text: I reported my frustration about not being able to import a backup, and the developer promptly updated the app to add that feature. Developers who listen to and act on user feedback deserve high praise.

items.name: James Franke
items.text: All I wanted was my app to open on startup. I tried other apps that were recommended, too complicated, and they didn't work. AutoStart+ was easy and it worked the first time.

items.name: Joseph Younger
items.text: Very easy to understand and use. Really handy, particularly when I am using an older keyboard without built-in clipboard access. Thanks so much!!

items.name: Liz W
items.text: Fantastic app, does exactly what I want it to do. Saves all my clips and I can add titles and organize them.

items.name: Mark Smith
items.text: So far, so good! Great app, just what I was looking for!

items.name: Roche Lopez
items.text: Yes, I like this app. Very useful, easy and convenient to use ♥️
